mapper.select: SELECT service_id, service_type_id, main_category, image_url, service_name, description, price, estimated_duration, available_status, create_time, update_time FROM service WHERE service_id = #{serviceId}

SELECT service_id, service_type_id, main_category, image_url, service_name, description, price, estimated_duration, available_status, create_time, update_time FROM service WHERE service_type_id = #{serviceTypeId} AND available_status = 1 ORDER BY service_id

SELECT service_id, service_type_id, main_category, image_url, service_name, description, price, estimated_duration, available_status, create_time, update_time FROM service WHERE available_status = 1 ORDER BY service_id

SELECT service_id, service_type_id, main_category, image_url, service_name, description, price, estimated_duration, available_status, create_time, update_time FROM service WHERE main_category = #{mainCategory} AND available_status = 1 ORDER BY service_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO service (service_type_id, main_category, image_url, service_name, description, price, estimated_duration, available_status) VALUES (#{serviceTypeId}, #{mainCategory}, #{imageUrl}, #{serviceName}, #{description}, #{price}, #{estimatedDuration}, #{availableStatus})
